word: G2775 - κεφαλαιόω - kephalaióō - kef-al-ahee-o'-o - Wound in the head

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Wound in the head
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Verb / வினைச்சொல்
1. to bring under heads, to sum up, to sum marize
2. to smite or wound in the head
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From the same as G2774; (specifically) to strike on the head: - wound in the head.
